Metadata.title: Yaroslav Dolhushyn — Full-Stack Engineer
Metadata.description: Full-Stack Engineer based in Germany. Building scalable web & mobile products with TypeScript, React, Next.js, and Node.js.

Hero.name: Yaroslav Dolhushyn
Hero.subtitle: I build AI-powered web applications for real-world use — not just demos.
Hero.note: Production architecture · low-latency AI pipelines · scalable serverless systems · privacy-aware design.

About.label: About
About.title: About Me
About.description: 7+ commercial products shipped. 100K+ users reached. 40% load time reduction. From AI voice apps to high-traffic video platforms — I build systems that perform under real conditions, not just in demos.
About.bio1: I own features end-to-end — API design, React or React Native UI, AWS infrastructure — and make sure everything holds up under real traffic. Currently focused on AI-native product architecture: streaming LLM systems, retrieval-augmented generation, and performance-optimized interfaces where intelligence enhances interaction in real time.
About.bio2: Based in Sangerhausen, Germany with full working rights (§24). Looking for a team that ships fast, cares about quality, and builds products people actually use. Open to on-site, hybrid, or remote across Germany.

items.0: AI & Voice Advisory App (Tech Lead): Architected a React Native & Nest.js platform. Enabled voice consultations and AI advice via OpenAI with custom prompting pipelines.
items.1: Creative Design Platform: Engineered a headless video rendering engine using Puppeteer, Express, and Nginx for server-side React animation rendering.
items.2: Helped evolve the platform from no-code constraints to a scalable cloud-based architecture supporting 70,000+ users.Engineered core monetization systems including internal wallet infrastructure, Stripe & PayPal integrations, payout automation logic, backend services, analytics pipelines, and AI-driven internal tools.
items.3: Video Course Platform: Handled 2,000+ users and 700+ paid subscriptions in 6 hours using optimized DB indexing and caching.
items.4: E-commerce Migration: Migrated React to Next.js. Improved LCP/CLS by 40% and reduced hosting costs by 17%.
items.5: Technical Leadership: Standardized CI/CD pipelines, linting rules, and reusable templates across projects.

Projects.label: Work
Projects.title: Featured Projects
Projects.subtitle: A selection of commercial products I've built and shipped.

0.title: Entertainment & Media Platform
0.description: Helped evolve the platform from no-code constraints to a scalable cloud-based architecture supporting 70,000+ users. Engineered core monetization systems including internal wallet infrastructure, Stripe & PayPal integrations, payout automation logic, backend services, analytics pipelines, and AI-driven internal tools.

1.title: AI & Voice Advisory App
1.description: Architected and delivered a production-ready full-stack platform enabling real-time voice consultations, with encrypted audio storage on AWS S3 and AI-powered guidance powered by OpenAI via custom prompt-engineered pipelines. Led the SDLC as Tech Lead, driving architectural decisions, overseeing delivery, and mentoring a junior engineer.

2.title: Internal CRM Platform
2.description: Owned mentorship and technical guidance for 6 interns, conducting thorough code reviews and providing actionable feedback to accelerate their growth. Drove launch readiness by stabilizing new features, and supporting deployment processes. 3 mentees were successfully hired as full-time engineers.

3.title: Video Course Platform
3.description: Subscription-based learning platform that handled 2,000+ users and 700+ paid subscriptions in just 6 hours after launch. Achieved through optimized DB indexing and caching strategies. Custom NestJS APIs and Stripe integration for seamless payments.

4.title: Headless Video Rendering Engine
4.description: Built a production-grade server-side video rendering engine powering a Canva-like design platform. Executed client-side React animations through Puppeteer, orchestrated by Express and Nginx, and exposed a resilient polling API ensuring reliable MP4 exports under high-load conditions.

5.title: Event & Community Platform
5.description: Assisted in developing marketplace features connecting brands with vetted local communities (run clubs, pilates collectives, studios), enabling authentic partnerships. Quickly onboarded into the codebase and supported feature delivery under tight deadlines during a short-term engagement.

6.title: Healthcare SaaS Refactor
6.description: Delivered a full platform refactor, improving code maintainability, scalability, and overall performance. Re-architected the signup flow by optimizing validation logic, reducing friction points, and streamlining user onboarding — resulting in increased conversion rates and improved system reliability.

7.title: E-commerce Next.js Migration
7.description: Migrated a legacy React SPA to Next.js. Improved Core Web Vitals (LCP/CLS) by 40% and reduced hosting costs by 17% through Docker containerization. Mentored a junior engineer on Next.js best practices and performance optimization.

8.title: This Portfolio
8.description: The site you're looking at. Built with Next.js 15, Three.js, Framer Motion, Tailwind CSS v4, and next-intl for EN/DE i18n. Includes an OpenAI-powered chat assistant with RAG, a voice interface with STT/TTS, and a cookie-consent-aware analytics setup.
